description: Courses and certs that keep me sharp

generativeAI.title: Generative AI: Introduction and Applications
generativeAI.description: What generative AI is, how it differs from traditional AI, and which tools exist for text, code, images, audio, and video — with real-world examples.

promptEngineering.title: Generative AI: Prompt Engineering Basics
